article_meta.title: The headquarters of the Euroclear financial institute in Brussels Photograph: Nicolas Maeterlinck/Belga Mag/AFP/Getty Im

reasoning: The summary maintains neutral, attributed language and avoids adopting the article’s loaded framing. Phrases like “intimidation campaign” are explicitly attributed to European intelligence agencies and hedged with “reportedly.” Opposing perspectives (Belgian legal concerns, Russia’s objections and lawsuit, Ukraine’s funding needs, EU debate, UK support) are included proportionally. No subjective adjectives or editorializing appear.

custom_reasoning.spin: Uses neutral verbs (reported, considering, warned, filed) and avoids loaded phrasing in its own voice.
custom_reasoning.unsubstantiated_claims: All contentious claims are attributed (to European intelligence, Russia, Ukrainian officials).
custom_reasoning.opinion_as_fact: No subjective judgments presented as fact; evaluative statements are ascribed to sources.
custom_reasoning.sensationalism: Tone is measured; no alarmist or dramatized language beyond sourced attributions.
custom_reasoning.mind_reading: Intent is framed as ‘reportedly intended,’ avoiding claims of knowledge of motives.
custom_reasoning.slant: Includes Russia’s stance, Belgium’s concerns, Ukraine’s needs, EU context, and UK support in balanced fashion.
custom_reasoning.bias_by_omission: Minor omissions (e.g., explicit note about ‘debate about degree of threat,’ Abramovich detail) but no major perspective dropped.
custom_reasoning.subjective_adjectives: No loaded adjectives used by the model itself.
custom_reasoning.negativity_bias: Reflects the article’s balance without exaggerating negative aspects.
custom_reasoning.elite_populist_bias: Treats official and other sources evenhandedly; no systematic deference.
custom_reasoning.framing_neutrality: Consistently more neutral than the source’s framing, with clear attributions and hedging.
custom_reasoning.perspective_completeness: Covers principal perspectives; a couple of minor elements underrepresented but overall proportional.
